title: Hide-and-Seek in the Garden
synopsis: A simple garden game becomes exciting when the hiding places are almost too good.
sentences: After lunch, three cousins went into the garden to play hide-and-seek.
Mina covered her eyes and counted slowly beside the back door.
While she counted, Leo ran behind the shed and Ava hid under the washing line.
Mina turned around and looked at the empty garden with a serious face.
She searched behind flower pots, under the table, and beside the hedge.
For a long time, she could not find anyone.
Then she noticed a shoe sticking out from behind the shed.
Leo laughed before Mina even said his name.
Ava was harder to find because she stayed very still.
At last, the wind moved the sheet beside her, and Mina saw her hidden smile.
The game went on until all three were warm and breathless.
By evening, they had used every hiding place in the garden.
